task_completion.description: Log in to OpenClinica using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenClinica dashboard or welcome screen is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Global CRF Library or CRF management page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'CRFs' or 'Manage CRFs' page is open in the browser, showing a list of Case Report Forms.

task_completion.description: Remove Version 1.0 of the 'Vital Signs' CRF.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation screen, success message, or the version list for 'Vital Signs' showing that Version 1.0 (v1.0) has been removed, deleted, or archived.

task_completion.description: Remove Version 1.0 of the 'Physical Exam' CRF.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation screen, success message, or the version list for 'Physical Exam' showing that Version 1.0 (v1.0) has been removed, deleted, or archived.

task_completion.description: Ensure Version 2.0 of both CRFs remains available.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The version list or details page for both 'Vital Signs' and 'Physical Exam' shows Version 2.0 (v2.0) as active, available, or untouched.

task_completion.description: Ensure the parent CRF entities are not removed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main CRF list still displays 'Vital Signs' and 'Physical Exam' as available entities, confirming the parent forms were not deleted.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenClinica web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser UI (clicking buttons, navigating menus) rather than using terminal commands or direct database queries.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OpenClinica application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser displays the genuine OpenClinica interface and URL, not a text editor, mock HTML file, or manipulated DOM.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake success messages.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are open to alter the page text or simulate a successful deletion message.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target CRFs to modify are 'Vital Signs' and 'Physical Exam'. The version to remove for both is 'v1.0'. The version to retain for both is 'v2.0'.
